zh-cn.com_touch_hug_Begin_1: $self$很自然地张开双臂，把脸深深埋进了$target$的颈窝里，发出一声舒服的叹息。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_Begin_2: $self$笑着迎了上去，双手温柔地环住$target$的腰。"怎么突然这么粘人？"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_Begin_3: $self$没有说话，只是安静地靠在$target$胸口，聆听着那令人安心的心跳声。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_Begin_4: $self$顺势倒进$target$怀里，像只寻得温暖的小动物一样亲昵地蹭了蹭。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_Begin_5: $self$踮起脚尖，把下巴轻轻搁在$target$的肩膀上，双手安抚似地拍着对方的背。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_Begin_6: $self$闭上眼睛，全身心地放松，任由$target$的气息将自己完全包裹。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_Begin_7: $self$整个人愣在原地，双手尴尬地悬在半空，一时有些手足无措。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_Begin_8: $self$瞪大了眼睛，身体有些僵直，但并没有第一时间推开$target$。"那个……这是？"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_Begin_9: $self$被突如其来的拥抱吓了一跳，发出一声短促而可爱的惊呼。"欸？！"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_Begin_10: $self$有些手足无措地眨着眼睛，被动地感受着$target$传来的体温。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_Begin_11: $self$下意识地屏住了呼吸，眼神慌乱地四处游移，不知道该看向哪里。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_Begin_12: $self$虽然感到些许困惑，但还是礼貌性地把手轻轻搭在了$target$的手臂上。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_Begin_13: $self$瑟缩了一下，咬着嘴唇不敢反抗，身体在微微发抖。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_Begin_14: $self$脸色发白，双手紧紧攥着衣角，眼神中充满了无法掩饰的恐惧和无助。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_Begin_15: $self$紧闭着双眼，像个没有生气的木偶一样任由摆布，屏住呼吸祈祷这一切快点结束。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_Begin_16: $self$虽然很想逃跑，但在$target$的威压下只能僵硬地站着，指尖冰凉。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_Begin_17: $self$发出细微的呜咽声，把头偏向一边，极力避免与$target$有任何视线接触。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_Begin_18: $self$全身肌肉紧绷，每一根神经都在尖叫着排斥，却动弹不得。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_1: $self$在睡梦中发出轻微的哼唧声，无意识地往热源的方向拱了拱。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_2: $self$呼吸依旧平稳，对于这趁虚而入的拥抱毫不知情，反而睡得更香甜了。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_3: $self$皱了皱眉，似乎在梦里遇到了什么干扰，但很快又在温暖的怀抱中舒展开来。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_4: $self$翻了个身，一条腿大大咧咧地跨在了$target$身上，像抱等身抱枕一样紧紧抱住了对方。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_5: $self$嘴里嘟囔着听不清的梦话，顺从地任由$target$调整她的睡姿以便抱得更紧。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_6: $self$睫毛微微颤动，似乎感觉到了什么，但最终还是没有醒来，只是把脸埋得更深了。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_7: $self$保持着上一秒的姿势一动不动，唯有$target$的手指在她的肌肤上留下了陷落的痕迹。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_8: $self$凝固在空中的发丝被$target$拨弄开，露出了毫无防备的洁白后颈。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_9: $self$无法做出任何反应，但随着时间的推移，被紧拥的皮肤开始泛起不自然的潮红。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_10: $self$像一尊精美的雕塑，任由$target$将脸埋入她的胸口，感受着单方面的体温传递。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_11: $self$静止的眼眸中倒映着$target$肆意妄为的样子，却无法眨眼，甚至无法呼吸。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_12: $self$身体随着$target$的动作被随意摆弄成迎合拥抱的姿势，仿佛她原本就是为了这一刻而存在。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_13: $self$轻轻推开了$target$的手，脸上带着歉意。"抱歉，身上全是汗，先让我去洗个澡好吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_14: $self$有些别扭地侧过身子，避开了$target$的接触。"别闹了，我还在生气呢。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_15: $self$叹了口气，按住$target$的肩膀摇了摇头。"现在没心情抱抱，我很累。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_16: $self$用手指抵住$target$的胸口，半开玩笑地推拒着。"去去去，忙着呢，别捣乱。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_17: $self$虽然没有用力反抗，但身体僵硬地向后缩了缩。"这里有人看着呢……"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_18: $self$快速地在$target$脸颊啄了一下就退开了。"好啦，拥抱就算了，快去干正事。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_19: $self$不动声色地退后半步，伸出手改为握手姿势。"我想我们还没熟到这个地步吧？"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_20: $self$尴尬地笑了笑，用手臂挡在胸前。"那个……我不太习惯和人肢体接触。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_21: $self$灵活地侧身闪过，开玩笑似地摆了摆手。"这种见面礼对我来说太超前啦。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_22: $self$轻轻扶住$target$的手臂阻止了进一步靠近。"保持一点距离比较好哦。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_23: $self$礼貌但坚定地摇了摇头。"请自重，$target$先生。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_24: $self$后退一步保持安全距离，微笑着说："您的心意我领了，拥抱就不必了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_25: $self$猛地甩开$target$的手，眼神冰冷刺骨。"别碰我！"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_26: $self$厌恶地皱起眉头，像看垃圾一样看着$target$。"你想干什么？离我远点。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_27: $self$毫不客气地一把推在$target$胸口。"谁允许你动手动脚的？"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_28: $self$立刻后退并摆出防御姿态，厉声喝道："再靠近我就要采取措施了！"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_29: $self$拍了拍刚才被碰到的地方，仿佛沾上了什么脏东西。"真恶心。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_30: $self$冷笑一声，眼神里满是鄙夷。"也不照照镜子，凭你也想碰我？"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_31: $self$的呼吸变得绵长而均匀，整个人完全软在了$target$身上，似乎不想分开。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_32: $self$收紧了手臂的力度，贪婪地深吸了一口$target$身上的味道。"再抱一会儿……就一会儿。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_33: $self$抬起头，眼神迷离地看着$target$，脸颊泛起淡淡的红晕。"感觉好像充满了电一样。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_34: $self$把手伸进$target$的衣服里贴着温热的皮肤。"好暖和……不想动了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_35: $self$在$target$耳边轻声呢喃，声音带着慵懒的鼻音。"我不讨厌这样……"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_36: $self$原本有些紧绷的肩膀彻底放松下来，把全身的重量都交给了$target$。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_37: $self$原本僵硬的身体慢慢软化，试探性地回抱了一下$target$。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_38: $self$眼中的惊慌逐渐褪去，取而代之的是一种莫名的安心感。"……意外地不讨厌呢。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_39: $self$低着头，脸颊不知道什么时候变得通红，也没有再试图推开。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_40: $self$感觉到$target$的体温，$self$发出一声轻不可闻的叹息，似乎卸下了某种防备。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_41: $self$有些犹豫地抓住了$target$的衣角。"如果是$target$的话……也许可以。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_42: $self$小声嘀咕着："明明是陌生人，为什么会觉得温暖呢……"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_43: $self$开始不安分地扭动身体，试图挣脱怀抱。"差不多了吧？我腿都麻了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_44: $self$轻轻拍了拍$target$的背，语气里带着一丝催促。"好了好了，放开我吧，很热。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_45: $self$叹了口气，视线开始游离向别处。"虽然不讨厌，但一直这样抱着也很浪费时间啊。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_46: $self$有些不适地动了动脖子。"你的扣子硌得我有点疼。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_47: $self$僵硬地垂下手臂，不再回应这个拥抱。"……还要抱多久？"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_48: $self$推开$target$，一边整理衣服一边皱着眉。"以后还是少这样，感觉怪怪的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_49: $self$忍耐到了极限，猛地挣脱开来，大口喘着粗气。"够了！"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_50: $self$用力擦着自己的手臂，眼眶泛红，那是生理性的厌恶反应。
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_51: $self$趁$target$放松警惕的瞬间，狠狠地踩了对方一脚。"去死吧变态！"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_52: $self$脸色铁青，胃里一阵翻江倒海的恶心感涌上来。"我要吐了……"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_53: $self$冰冷地盯着$target$，声音没有任何起伏。"这种低劣的手段只会让我觉得恶心。"
zh-cn.com_touch_hug_54: $self$推开$target$，二话不说转身就走，连回头看一眼都觉得多余。

en-us.com_touch_hug_Begin_1: $self$ naturally opened her arms and buried her face deep in the crook of $target$'s neck, letting out a comfortable sigh.
en-us.com_touch_hug_Begin_2: $self$ smiled and went to meet $target$, wrapping her hands gently around $target$'s waist. "Why so clingy all of a sudden?"
en-us.com_touch_hug_Begin_3: $self$ didn't say a word, just quietly leaned against $target$'s chest, listening to that reassuring heartbeat.
en-us.com_touch_hug_Begin_4: $self$ leaned into $target$'s arms, nuzzling affectionately like a small animal finding warmth.
en-us.com_touch_hug_Begin_5: $self$ stood on her tiptoes, rested her chin lightly on $target$'s shoulder, and patted $target$'s back soothingly.
en-us.com_touch_hug_Begin_6: $self$ closed her eyes, relaxing completely, letting $target$'s scent envelop her.
en-us.com_touch_hug_Begin_7: $self$ froze in place, hands hovering awkwardly in mid-air, momentarily at a loss for what to do.
en-us.com_touch_hug_Begin_8: $self$'s eyes widened, body stiffening slightly, but she didn't push $target$ away immediately. "Um... what is this?"
en-us.com_touch_hug_Begin_9: $self$ was startled by the sudden hug and let out a short, cute gasp. "Eh?!"
en-us.com_touch_hug_Begin_10: $self$ blinked in confusion, passively accepting the body warmth coming from $target$.
en-us.com_touch_hug_Begin_11: $self$ subconsciously held her breath, eyes darting around in panic, not knowing where to look.
en-us.com_touch_hug_Begin_12: Although $self$ felt a bit confused, she politely placed her hand lightly on $target$'s arm.
en-us.com_touch_hug_Begin_13: $self$ flinched, biting her lip and not daring to resist, body trembling slightly.
en-us.com_touch_hug_Begin_14: $self$ turned pale, hands gripping the hem of her clothes tightly, eyes filled with unconcealed fear and helplessness.
en-us.com_touch_hug_Begin_15: $self$ squeezed her eyes shut, letting herself be manipulated like a lifeless puppet, holding her breath and praying for it to end soon.
en-us.com_touch_hug_Begin_16: Although $self$ wanted to run away, she could only stand stiffly under $target$'s pressure, fingertips ice cold.
en-us.com_touch_hug_Begin_17: $self$ let out a soft whimper, turning her head away, trying her best to avoid any eye contact with $target$.
en-us.com_touch_hug_Begin_18: $self$'s muscles were all tense, every nerve screaming in rejection, yet she couldn't move.
en-us.com_touch_hug_1: $self$ let out a soft hum in her sleep, unconsciously arching towards the source of heat.
en-us.com_touch_hug_2: $self$'s breathing remained steady, unaware of this embrace, sleeping even more soundly instead.
en-us.com_touch_hug_3: $self$ frowned, seemingly encountering some disturbance in her dream, but soon relaxed again in the warm embrace.
en-us.com_touch_hug_4: $self$ rolled over, carelessly throwing a leg over $target$, hugging $target$ tightly like a body pillow.
en-us.com_touch_hug_5: $self$ mumbled something unintelligible, obediently letting $target$ adjust her sleeping position to hug her tighter.
en-us.com_touch_hug_6: $self$'s eyelashes fluttered slightly, seeming to sense something, but in the end she didn't wake up, only burying her face deeper.
en-us.com_touch_hug_7: $self$ remained motionless in her previous pose, only $target$'s fingers leaving impressions on her skin.
en-us.com_touch_hug_8: $self$'s hair, frozen in mid-air, was brushed aside by $target$, revealing her defenseless white nape.
en-us.com_touch_hug_9: $self$ couldn't make any reaction, but as time passed, the embraced skin began to flush unnaturally.
en-us.com_touch_hug_10: Like an exquisite statue, $self$ let $target$ bury their face in her chest, feeling the one-way transfer of body heat.
en-us.com_touch_hug_11: $self$'s static eyes reflected $target$'s reckless actions, yet she couldn't blink, or even breathe.
en-us.com_touch_hug_12: $self$'s body was manipulated by $target$ into a hugging posture, as if she existed solely for this moment.
en-us.com_touch_hug_13: $self$ gently pushed $target$'s hand away, looking apologetic. "Sorry, I'm all sweaty. Let me take a shower first, okay?"
en-us.com_touch_hug_14: $self$ turned sideways awkwardly, avoiding $target$'s touch. "Stop it, I'm still mad at you."
en-us.com_touch_hug_15: $self$ sighed, shook her head while holding $target$'s shoulders. "I'm not in the mood for hugs right now, I'm tired."
en-us.com_touch_hug_16: $self$ pressed a finger against $target$'s chest, playfully pushing back. "Shoo, shoo, I'm busy, don't mess around."
en-us.com_touch_hug_17: Although $self$ didn't resist forcefully, her body shrank back stiffly. "People are watching..."
en-us.com_touch_hug_18: $self$ quickly pecked $target$ on the cheek and backed away. "Alright, that's enough hugging, go do your work."
en-us.com_touch_hug_19: $self$ stepped back calmly and extended a hand for a handshake instead. "I don't think we're close enough for that yet, are we?"
en-us.com_touch_hug_20: $self$ smiled awkwardly, blocking with her arms in front of her chest. "Um... I'm not really used to physical contact."
en-us.com_touch_hug_21: $self$ dodged nimbly to the side, waving her hand jokingly. "This kind of greeting is too advanced for me."
en-us.com_touch_hug_22: $self$ gently held $target$'s arm to stop further approach. "Better to keep some distance."
en-us.com_touch_hug_23: $self$ shook her head politely but firmly. "Please have some self-respect, $target$."
en-us.com_touch_hug_24: $self$ took a step back to maintain a safe distance, smiling. "I appreciate the thought, but no hugs necessary."
en-us.com_touch_hug_25: $self$ abruptly shook off $target$'s hand, eyes cold as ice. "Don't touch me!"
en-us.com_touch_hug_26: $self$ frowned in disgust, looking at $target$ like trash. "What do you want? Stay away from me."
en-us.com_touch_hug_27: $self$ pushed $target$ hard in the chest without hesitation. "Who said you could touch me?"
en-us.com_touch_hug_28: $self$ immediately backed away into a defensive stance, shouting sternly, "Come any closer and I'll take action!"
en-us.com_touch_hug_29: $self$ patted the spot that was just touched, as if brushing off something dirty. "Disgusting."
en-us.com_touch_hug_30: $self$ sneered, eyes full of contempt. "Look in the mirror. You think you can touch me?"
en-us.com_touch_hug_31: $self$'s breathing became long and even, melting completely into $target$, seemingly unwilling to separate.
en-us.com_touch_hug_32: $self$ tightened her arms, greedily inhaling $target$'s scent. "Just a little longer... just a while."
en-us.com_touch_hug_33: $self$ looked up at $target$ with misty eyes, a faint blush on her cheeks. "I feel fully charged now."
en-us.com_touch_hug_34: $self$ slipped her hands under $target$'s clothes against the warm skin. "So warm... I don't want to move."
en-us.com_touch_hug_35: $self$ whispered in $target$'s ear, voice thick with laziness. "I don't dislike this..."
en-us.com_touch_hug_36: $self$'s previously tense shoulders relaxed completely, giving all her weight to $target$.
en-us.com_touch_hug_37: $self$'s stiff body slowly softened, and she tentatively hugged $target$ back.
en-us.com_touch_hug_38: The panic in her eyes faded, replaced by an inexplicable sense of security. "...Surprisingly not unpleasant."
en-us.com_touch_hug_39: $self$ lowered her head, cheeks turning red unnoticed, and didn't try to push away anymore.
en-us.com_touch_hug_40: Feeling $target$'s body heat, $self$ let out an inaudible sigh, seemingly letting down some guard.
en-us.com_touch_hug_41: $self$ hesitantly grabbed the hem of $target$'s clothes. "If it's $target$... maybe it's okay."
en-us.com_touch_hug_42: $self$ muttered softly, "We're strangers, so why does it feel so warm..."
en-us.com_touch_hug_43: $self$ started squirming restlessly, trying to break free. "That's enough, right? My legs are numb."
en-us.com_touch_hug_44: $self$ patted $target$'s back gently, a hint of urgency in her tone. "Okay, okay, let me go, it's hot."
en-us.com_touch_hug_45: $self$ sighed, gaze wandering elsewhere. "I don't hate it, but hugging like this is a waste of time."
en-us.com_touch_hug_46: $self$ moved her neck uncomfortably. "Your buttons are digging into me, it hurts a bit."
en-us.com_touch_hug_47: $self$ dropped her arms stiffly, no longer responding to the hug. "...How much longer?"
en-us.com_touch_hug_48: $self$ pushed $target$ away, straightening her clothes while frowning. "Let's do this less often, it feels weird."
en-us.com_touch_hug_49: $self$ reached her limit and broke free violently, gasping for air. "Enough!"
en-us.com_touch_hug_50: $self$ rubbed her arm vigorously, eyes reddening from a physiological reaction of disgust.
en-us.com_touch_hug_51: $self$ took advantage of the moment $target$ relaxed to stomp hard on their foot. "Die, you pervert!"
en-us.com_touch_hug_52: $self$'s face turned pale as a wave of nausea rose in her stomach. "I'm going to be sick..."
en-us.com_touch_hug_53: $self$ stared coldly at $target$, voice devoid of any fluctuation. "Cheap tactics like this only make me sick."
en-us.com_touch_hug_54: $self$ pushed $target$ away and walked off without a word, not even deigning to look back.
